changelog: Fixed: some downloads would randomly fail or get stuck — now much more stable
Fixed: pausing or cancelling a download showed 0% progress instead of where it actually left off
Fixed: speed showed an impossible number (like 1.5 GB/s) right when a download started
Fixed: speed limit setting showed 0 after closing and reopening the settings panel
Fixed: changing the speed limit for a running download had no effect until restart
Fixed: the Reset to Defaults button in settings did nothing when clicked
Fixed: some files downloaded with a wrong or garbled filename
Fixed: the in-app update could silently fail and leave you on the old version
Fixed: updating the app on some machines required admin rights but never asked for them — now it does
Added: if a server blocks the download, Aither automatically retries with a different identity (up to 3 times)
Added: Aither now warns you to close your browser before updating the extension bridge, to avoid conflicts
